results.text: {"answer_label":"drop-exit-code","answer":"Drop it before the stable schema freeze: it is always 0 for scored results or null otherwise, so it does not report a real process outcome and invites false interpretation.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Keeping it could reserve a familiar extension point, but no shipped grader provides independent exit data and a later removal would break the frozen schema.","evidence":["The field is hardcoded to 0 for scored results and null otherwise, regardless of what ran.","No shipped grader supplies an independent process exit through this field; removal before the freeze needs no compatibility handling."]}

code_graph_delta.summary: code graph delta skipped: read-only run
